# Al-Rahma Academy

> Al-Rahma Academy teaches the Holy Quran, Arabic and Islamic studies online through one-to-one live lessons with certified Al-Azhar tutors, for children and adults across Europe and worldwide. Two free trial classes, flexible scheduling, female tutors available.

## Main pages
- [Home](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/): Overview of courses, pricing and the free trial.
- [About](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/academy/about): Mission, vision and values of the academy.
- [Teachers](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/academy/teachers): Certified Al-Azhar tutors and their specialties.
- [FAQ](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/resources/faq): Answers about lessons, pricing, trials and certificates.
- [Free Trial / Enrollment](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/enroll): Book two free trial classes.

## Courses
- [Courses Hub](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/courses): All available courses.
- [Quran & Tajweed](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/courses/quran): Quran reading, Tajweed and Hifz programme.
- [Arabic Language](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/courses/arabic): Modern Standard Arabic for all levels.
- [Ijazah Certification](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/courses/ijazah): Quran memorization and recitation with a connected chain (sanad).
- [Islamic Studies](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/courses/islamic-studies): Fiqh, Aqeedah, Seerah and Arabic.

## Tools
- [Tools Hub](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/tools): All Islamic tools.
- [Quran Reader](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/tools/quran-reader): Full Quran reader with Hifz tracker.
- [Adhkar](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/tools/adhkar): Daily remembrances (Azkar).
- [Hadith Library](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/tools/hadith): Searchable hadith collections.
- [Prayer Times](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/tools/prayer): Prayer times, Qibla and Islamic calendar.
- [Blog](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/resources/blog): Articles on Quran learning, Tajweed and Arabic.

## Locale pages (pre-rendered)
- [Italian landing page](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/it/)
- [French landing page](https://al-rahmaacademy.com/fr/)
